---
title: "Contact"
---

## Get in touch

I welcome collaborations, questions about my work, and opportunities to connect.

| | |
|---|---|
| **Email** | [your.name@institution.edu](mailto:your.name@institution.edu) |
| **Office** | [Building, room], [Institution], [City, Country] |
| **GitHub** | [github.com/faadilmustun](https://github.com/faadilmustun) |
| **Google Scholar** | [scholar.google.com/...](https://scholar.google.com/) |
| **ORCID** | [orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000](https://orcid.org/) |
| **LinkedIn** | [linkedin.com/in/...](https://linkedin.com/) |

## Mailing address

```
Your Name
Department / Lab
Institution
Street address
City, Postal code
Country
```

## Collaboration

If you are interested in collaborating, please email a short description of your
project and how our work might align. I aim to respond within [X] business days.
